channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: Yeachan-Heo / oh-my-codex
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 14,056 → 14,675 (+619) | Ranked #1
OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.
Language: TypeScript 3,047 stars today

item.title: onyx-dot-app / onyx
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 23,219 → 23,582 (+363) | Ranked #2

Language: Python 1,852 stars today

item.title: google-research / timesfm
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 14,099 → 14,327 (+228) | Ranked #3
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.
Language: Python 916 stars today

item.title: siddharthvaddem / openscreen
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 18,125 → 18,636 (+511) | Ranked #4
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
Language: TypeScript 2,771 stars today

item.description:
⭐ Stars: 3,238 → 3,397 (+159) | Ranked #5

item.title: f / prompts.chat

⭐ Stars: 157,162 → 157,338 (+176) | Ranked #6
